idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'warehouse labor strike' signals freight disruption
behavior: Rising search interest in labor strikes at warehouses often precedes slower freight movement and supply chain delays.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector ETFs are sensitive to freight and logistics disruptions.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short on XLI when weekly Google Trends for 'warehouse labor strike' rises 30%+ from prior week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when trend falls below 10% weekly increase

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor unrest and strike-related searches spike multiple times yearly, especially seasonally.

idea: Daily jump in consumer Google Trends for 'car insurance claims' signals rising stress in discretionary auto spending
behavior: Increased searches for car insurance claims often indicate consumer financial strain impacting discretionary auto purchases.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary spending on autos is pressured by rising insurance claims and costs.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLY when daily Google Trends for 'car insurance claims' rises 20%+ from previous day
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or when searches decline by 10%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Consumer stress topics frequently spike during insurance claim waves and weather events.

idea: Weekly increase in FRED data for 'steel producer price index' signals inflation pressure on materials sector
behavior: Rising steel producer prices often indicate cost pressure that can squeeze margins in materials and industrial sectors.

market_impact.rationale: Materials sector profitability is sensitive to input cost inflation like steel prices.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLB when weekly steel PPI rises more than 1% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when steel PPI growth rate drops below 0.2%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Steel price indexes move regularly with inflation cycles and supply shocks.

idea: Daily spike in RSS news count for 'cargo ship delays' signals upcoming freight logistics slowdowns
behavior: Increased media mentions of cargo ship delays often precede measurable freight and supply chain bottlenecks.

market_impact.rationale: Freight delays reduce industrial throughput and pressure industrial sector earnings.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI when daily RSS count for 'cargo ship delay' articles rises 50%+ day-over-day
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when RSS counts normalize

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: News cycles around freight delays spike frequently due to port congestion and weather.
